blockedAssertions.blockedBy: App.asar packaging issue - running app uses stale build. Fix verified in dist files but not reflected in running application.
blockedAssertions.evidence: Source (COAFormPage.tsx) and dist (index-CUpoIoxE.js) contain correct regex /^[0-9]+(-[0-9]+)*$/ that accepts '11-11-001' format. However, the packaged app.asar was not updated after rebuild, so running app loads old validation logic.

notTestedAssertions.reason: No assertions could be tested due to Electron CDP connection issues and asar packaging problem

environmentIssues.description: agent-browser --auto-connect and --cdp 9222 could not connect to Electron despite DevTools listening on ws://127.0.0.1:9222
attemptedSolutions: Rebuilt asar package with latest dist files
Tried npm run dev (uses dist directly)
Tried npm run start (uses packaged app.asar)
